category_sources: Official homepage describes gtk-gnutella as a Gnutella peer-to-peer server/client.
source_facts.description says it shares files in a peer-to-peer network.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and git guide use the gtk-gnutella name.
docs_sources: Official project site hosts Doxygen source documentation under /doxygen/.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site and main user-facing documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official gtk-gnutella git guide says current source code is hosted on GitHub at gtk-gnutella/gtk-gnutella.
tags_sources: Official homepage identifies Gnutella and GTK support.
source_facts.description supports file-sharing and peer-to-peer tags.
